overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk from beneath a dark highway overpass into a bright open industrial district dominated by massive graffiti-covered cooling towers. The scene features futuristic vehicles, pedestrians, and large digital billboards along a concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: bright daylight becomes visible at the end of the overpass tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shadowy covered walkway beneath the highway

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the road to the left

entered.detail: dark concrete highway structure overhead creating a tunnel effect
steep angled concrete wall with graffiti running along the right side
multi-lane road with vehicles passing by
massive concrete support beams and highway deck overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dimly lit concrete corridor beneath a highway overpass. The environment is enclosed and shadowy, with a steep retaining wall on the right and a multi-lane road with passing vehicles on the left. Pedestrians occasionally walk past in the opposite direction as the camera moves steadily forward toward the bright exit visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial boulevard with nuclear cooling towers

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open industrial area with cooling towers visible ahead
emerges from deep shadow into bright direct sunlight causing exposure adjustment

agents.ego_description: walking out from the tunnel into the bright open street toward the industrial towers

notable_agents.action: person wearing a bright pink hat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive twin nuclear cooling towers with graffiti and steam vents dominating the skyline
large illuminated advertising screen mounted on the retaining wall
hazy mountain range visible beyond the industrial complex

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark overpass into a bright, wide-open industrial district. Massive cooling towers with colorful graffiti rise in the distance on the left, while large digital billboards illuminate the right side. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to harsh sunlight as the walk continues along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district passing cooling tower complex

events.description: slight turn to the right as the path curves along the industrial wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing the cooling towers while observing the industrial scenery

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: chain-link fencing surrounding the cooling tower facility
metal framework and industrial structures attached to the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the walk continuing past the massive cooling towers, which now recede into the left background. The camera moves along the industrial corridor with digital billboards flashing advertisements on the right and the fenced-off power facility on the left. Vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent road as the open industrial landscape stretches ahead toward distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a claustrophobic, shadowy underpass into a sprawling, sun-drenched industrial district. It begins within a dimly lit concrete corridor beneath a highway overpass, moving past a steep retaining wall and passing vehicles toward a bright light at the exit. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens abruptly into a wide district where the lighting shifts to harsh sunlight and massive, graffiti-covered cooling towers rise in the distance. The scene then expands further along a concrete sidewalk, passing flashing digital billboards on the right and a fenced-off power facility on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward as the cooling towers recede into the background, revealing an open industrial landscape that stretches toward distant mountains.
